entities.name: IN-VITRO MEASUREMENT
entities.description: Rapid and convenient method for screening iron bioavailability in plant-based foods

entities.name: IRON BIOAVAILABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of iron from food that is absorbed and used by the body

entities.name: PLANT-BASED FOODS
entities.description: Foods derived from plants, including fruits, vegetables, cereals, and legumes

entities.name: BIO-ACCESSIBILITY
entities.description: The fraction of a nutrient that is released from the food matrix in the gastrointestinal tract

entities.name: FRUITS
entities.description: Plant-based foods used for assessing iron bioavailability

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: Plant-based foods used for assessing iron bioavailability

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Plant-based foods used for assessing iron bioavailability

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plant-based foods used for assessing iron bioavailability

entities.name: INHIBITORS
entities.description: Substances that reduce the bioavailability of iron

entities.name: PROCESSING
entities.description: Treatment of foods that affects the bioavailability of iron

entities.name: INFOGEST METHOD
entities.description: A recent standardized in-vitro method used to measure iron bioavailability in plant-based foods

entities.name: HUMAN TRIALS
entities.description: Definitive tests for iron bioavailability following preliminary in-vitro screening
